---
title: "Werewolves of the Bayou Bibliography"
author: "Jack LaRoche"
date: "2026-01-10"
categories: [QAA, Bibliography, Werewolves]
---

# Rougarou Bibliography

**Werewolf Histories**
Willem de Blecourt

**The Book of Were-Wolves**
Sabine Baring-Gould

**Witches, Werewolves, and Fairies: Shapeshifters and Astral Doubles in the Middle Ages**
Claude Lecouteux

**Swapping Stories: Folktales from Louisiana**
Edited by Carl Lindahl, Maida Owens, and C. Renee Harvison

**Folklore Figures of French and Creole Louisiana**
Nathan J. Rabalais

![](https://i.ibb.co/21mKV8Kw/rougarou.jpg)
